title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.050 - Records to be kept — retention period
text:
313.050.  Records to be kept — retention period. — Each licensee shall keep a complete record of bingo games conducted within the previous two years, except for the records stipulated as one-year retention by regulation.  Such records shall be open to inspection by the commission.
(L. 1981 H.B. 322 § 10, A.L. 1993 S.B. 10 & 11, A.L. 2010 S.B. 940)
